- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 13:21:15 GMT
- **摘要：** The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

### [Mexico Outlook Changed to Negative at S&amp;P as Debts Mount](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/mexico-rating-outlook-revised-to-negative-at-s-p-as-debts-mount)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 21:40:00 GMT
- **摘要：** S&amp;P Global Ratings revised Mexico’s credit outlook to negative from stable, citing persistently weak fiscal results, rising debt levels and weak economic growth.

### [Tech Rally Lifts Stocks Despite Inflation Pickup: Markets Wrap](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/asian-stocks-under-pressure-as-us-inflation-rises-markets-wrap)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Tue, 12 May 2026 22:08:25 GMT
- **摘要：** A rally in the world’s largest technology companies fueled gains in stocks, overshadowing data showing a resurgence in inflation that sent bonds lower on concern the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer.

### [Fed's Collins Favors Keeping Rates on Hold for ‘Some Time’](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2026-05-13/fed-s-collins-favors-keeping-rates-on-hold-video)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 16:45:01 GMT
- **摘要：** Federal Reserve Bank of Boston President Susan Collins says interest rates should remain on hold for “some time,” arguing she is particularly concerned about elevated inflation. She speaks during an event organized by the Boston Economic Club. (Source: Bloomberg)

### [Jump in Gamma Points to Investors Chasing the Market](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2026-05-13/jump-in-gamma-points-to-investors-chasing-the-market-video)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 16:43:55 GMT
- **摘要：** Stock market gamma has jumped higher in one of the most rapid moves seen. 
Simon White, Macro Strategist with Bloomberg News, explains what gamma's sudden, near record high surge means for the market going forward. (Source: Bloomberg)

### [The Iran War Is Going to Make Your Car’s Oil Change More Pricey](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-13/the-iran-war-is-going-to-make-your-car-s-oil-change-more-pricey)

- **來源：** Bloomberg Markets
- **時間：** Wed, 13 May 2026 16:27:24 GMT
- **摘要：** The Iran war is throwing a niche corner of the oil market into disarray as fallout from scrambled supply chains for the commodity reaches all the way to the automotive maintenance and industrial sectors.
